<h3 class="title_31 pt-60 sppt-30 orange_faac32">車輌情報
</h3>
<div class="contact_flex contact2 mt-15 spmt-10">
	<div class="c_flex">
		<p class="con_cell1">車種<span class="hissu">*</span>
		</p>
		<div class="con_cell2">
			<p><span class="wpcf7-form-control-wrap" data-name="car-1"><input size="40" maxlength="400" class="wpcf7-form-control wpcf7-text wpcf7-validates-as-required size" aria-required="true" aria-invalid="false" value="" type="text" name="car-1" /></span>
			</p>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div class="c_flex">
		<p class="con_cell1">走行可否<span class="hissu">*</span>
		</p>
		<div class="con_cell2">
			<div class="label_flex">
				<p><span class="wpcf7-form-control-wrap" data-name="radio-1"><span class="wpcf7-form-control wpcf7-radio"><span class="wpcf7-list-item first"><label><input type="radio" name="radio-1" value="走る" checked="checked" /><span class="wpcf7-list-item-label">走る</span></label></span><span class="wpcf7-list-item"><label><input type="radio" name="radio-1" value="走らない" /><span class="wpcf7-list-item-label">走らない</span></label></span><span class="wpcf7-list-item last"><label><input type="radio" name="radio-1" value="事故車" /><span class="wpcf7-list-item-label">事故車</span></label></span></span></span>
				</p>
			</div>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div class="c_flex">
		<p class="con_cell1">車台番号
		</p>
		<div class="con_cell2">
			<p><span class="wpcf7-form-control-wrap" data-name="num-1"><input size="40" maxlength="400" class="wpcf7-form-control wpcf7-text size" aria-invalid="false" placeholder="例) HK-NHW10" value="" type="text" name="num-1" /></span>
			</p>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div class="c_flex">
		<p class="con_cell1">備考
		</p>
		<div class="con_cell2">
			<p><span class="wpcf7-form-control-wrap" data-name="textarea-1"><textarea cols="40" rows="10" maxlength="2000" class="wpcf7-form-control wpcf7-textarea area" aria-invalid="false" placeholder="例）車検残○ヶ月、排気量等お分かりになればご入力下さい。" name="textarea-1"></textarea></span>
			</p>
		</div>
	</div>
	<div class="c_flex">
		<p class="con_cell1">画像添付
		</p>
		<div class="con_cell2">
			<div class="file">
				<p><span class="wpcf7-form-control-wrap" data-name="file-1"><input size="40" class="wpcf7-form-control wpcf7-file" accept=".jpg,.jpeg,.png,.gif,.pdf" aria-invalid="false" type="file" name="file-1" /></span>
				</p>
			</div>
			<p class="mt-5 text_15">対応ファイル形式：　 .jpg　.png　.gif
			</p>
			<p class="mt-5 text_15">最大アップロードサイズ：　 5MB
			</p>
		</div>
	</div>
</div>
<h3 class="title_31 pt-80 sppt-40 orange_faac32">お客様情報
</h3>
<div class="contact_flex contact2 mt-15 spmt-10">

		</p>
		<div class="con_cell2">

<script type="text/javascript">
$(function () {
//二重送信抑制
	let submitBtn = $("input[type='submit'].wpcf7-submit");
	submitBtn.click(function () {
		$(this).css('pointer-events', 'none');
		$(this).css('opacity', '0.5');
	})
	// 入力項目にエラーがあったらボタン復活
	document.addEventListener('wpcf7invalid', function () {
		submitBtn.css('pointer-events', 'auto');
		submitBtn.css('opacity', '1');
	}, false);
});
</script>
